outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: Pope Leo says 'not in my interest' to debate Trump over Iran war
outlets.summary: NBC covers Pope Leo XIV declining to engage Trump in direct debate over Iran war but reiterating peace message. Called threat to annihilate Iranian civilization 'truly unacceptable.'

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Gasoline prices could drop following crude oil drop — but Hormuz reversal complicates
outlets.summary: NPR analyzes potential gas price relief after oil's brief plunge on Hormuz opening, complicated by Iran's same-day reversal. EIA projects gas peak $4.30 in April.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Hegseth warns Iranian leaders to 'choose wisely' on deal: 'We are locked and loaded'
outlets.summary: Fox covers Hegseth warning Iran to 'choose wisely' ahead of April 22 ceasefire deadline. Iran unable to replenish military power 7 weeks into the war.

outlets.name: Washington Times
outlets.headline: Macron says French soldier killed, 3 wounded in attack on peacekeepers in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Washington Times covers killing of French UNIFIL SGM Montorio at Ghandouriyeh. Macron blames Hezbollah.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again over US blockade of its ports
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera covers Iran's Hormuz re-closure, blaming US for maintaining blockade during ceasefire. IRGC fires on Indian tankers.

outlets.name: PBS News
outlets.headline: French soldier killed in attack on U.N. peacekeepers in Lebanon
outlets.summary: PBS covers UNIFIL ambush at Ghandouriyeh. SGM Montorio killed, 3 wounded. France demands arrests. Second European military death in war.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF reservist Lidor Porat killed in southern Lebanon; Kalfon dies of wounds
outlets.summary: Jerusalem Post reports two IDF soldiers killed on deadliest day since Lebanon ceasefire. Porat (31) killed in combat, Kalfon (48) died from pre-planted explosive wounds. 9 more soldiers wounded.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: IDF drone strike kills one in south Lebanon on first day of truce
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports IDF drone killed Hezbollah anti-tank missile operator in ceasefire violation. Netanyahu 'not finished' with Hezbollah.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran pushed back enemy using asymmetric warfare strategy: Qalibaf
outlets.summary: Press TV covers Qalibaf warning that Iran threatened to fire on US minesweeper during Islamabad talks. Frames Hormuz re-closure as response to US bad faith.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: IRGC fires at Indian vessel in Hormuz as Iran tightens strait control
outlets.summary: Iran International covers IRGC firing on Indian ship. Mojtaba Khamenei Army Day message: drones 'strike like lightning.' Navy ready for 'new bitter defeats.'
